commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
I have delivered. Here the time past is put for the future; i.e., I shall deliver.
The mighty one, viz., Nabuchodonosor, who conquered both the Assyrians and Egyptians; (Challoner) or rather his father, Nabopolassar, subdued the former, ver. 3. (Haydock)
